creator: jcwells@u.washington.edu
text:
On Sun, 25 Apr 1999, Kris Kennaway wrote:

>On Thu, 1 Apr 1999, Jason C. Wells wrote:
>
>How did you go with this?

Doh! Thanks for getting back with me. The website was down right after I
supped new ports so I was unable to submit a followup report. I then let
it slip.

The ports collection no longer has a /usr/ports/kde directory. The pr5446
situation no longer can be tested.

I will say that a complete build from /usr/ports/x11/kde with no problems.
I would recommend closing this pr.

Sorry for not following up on that in a timely manner. Thanks for
reminding me.

Catchya Later,		|	Give me UNIX or give me a typewriter.
Jason Wells		|	http://www.freebsd.org/
